subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-22
subcodes.first_line: Everyone must do away with false prejudices and must even go to the other churches and mosques
subcodes.subjects: @blind imitation [taqlid], @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @fanaticism and hatred
